input: Pase iyange igen shin tar i tahav mbu mbu urugh akaa sha tar la mbu hide ijime sha ivande ahwa kpuaa yô. Ior man annyamev ka ve er nena?
Er or u yange nan lu or u eren kwagh sha inja kpa nan hingir or u vihin tu sha ci u mkav u vihin u nan lu ker la.
Nger kwagh u or u nan lu or u masetyô u nan lu uma ken tar u u ze hemen a ve shio yô.

Nger email u dondon sha kwagh u yange u pine u sha kwagh u tom kasua uhar mba karen ne. Tese wer u za hemen u lun a isharen sha tom la, shi sugh or u nan lu pinen we kwagh la sha shighe u nan ne la, shi pine nan kwagh u he.

Gba u ú sôr mkombo vea or u ú eren tom a nan imôngo la sha er ne lam sha kwagh u tom ugen u u lu zan hemen yô. Nger washika sha Intanet sha icivir, sôn shighe u vough u eren mkombo la, shi nger kwagh u u soo u eren la kpuaa.
Nger or u nengen sha we la washika sha Intanet, pine un kwagh u u er sha ripoti i u sember nan la. Pase wer u soo u seer eren tom wou shi pine mbamhen mba u soo u eren la jighilii.
Nger email hen orvesen wou sha u zamber we er u kera er tom u been ga yo. Pase ityôkyaa i i ne ve kwagh a lu zan hemen la, shi ôr akaa a u er ve kwagh ne una kera er ga yô.
U nenge a inyaregh ki u kimbin hanma uwer la shami ga. Nger washika hen afishi a nengen sha kwagh u inyaregh ki kimbin la sha Intanet, pase kwagh u a lu zan hemen la shi sôn wer i sôr kwagh shon.

Nger washika hen afishi a nengen sha kwagh u mbayamen akaa a ken kômpeni ugen la sha Intanet sha er u ôr kwagh u vihin u yange er u sha kwagh u tom ve la yô. Pase zayol la shi ôr gbenda u u soo wer i sôr un la kpaa.
Nôngo u ngeren kwagh sha Intanet sha u sônon wer i hide a mi shin i gema kwagh u u yam sha Intanet la. Nger namba u kwagh u u soo u yamen la man ityôkyaa i u hide a mi la kpaa.
Nger email hen ijende you i u lu a lam a na ga ica i gbe yô. Kpoghol ve sha kwagh u a lu zan hemen ken uma wou la shi pine ve er ve lu yô.
Nger washika u sughun or u hen tsombor wou shin ijende you sha iyua i ve ne u la. Pase jighilii ityôkyaa i i ne ve u lu a iwuese sha iyua la man gbenda u u we ishima u eren tom a mi la kpaa.
Nôngo u ngeren kwagh sha email u lôhôn azende a ou iniongo i u lu eren la. Nger akaa a sha kwagh u iyange man shighe man ijiir kua hanma kwagh u vesen u i er cii.
Nger email u sughun ijende you shin or u u eren tom a nan imôngo sha kwagh u nan sember eren yô. Pase er i saan we iyol sha ci ve yô, shi ôr ve mkaanem ma taver ve ishima kpaa.
Nger email hen ijende you i kôôsôô shin or u hen tsombor wou u pasen loho u doon tsung. Pase ve vighe vighe man er i lu u ken ishima la kpaa.

Nger washika hen afishi a nengen sha kwagh u nyôron yunivasiti la sha Intanet, sôn kwagh u ma porogeram ugen. Pine kwagh u gbenda u eren apelekeshen la, ayange a i gbe u a er tom la, man akaa agen kpaa.
Nôngo u tindin or u ngise lu profesôr la a loho sha Intanet, kaa wer nana nger washika u nan we ian i eren tom ne. Na akaa a sha kwagh u iantom la vighe vighe shi kaa wer u seer nan we akaa agen.
Nger ortom u gomoti washika sha Intanet sha kwagh u a lu zan we iyol hen ijiir you yô. Pase akaa a a ze u iyol la, shi na akaa a a sue kwagh ne yô, shi na mhen sha akaa a u er ve u sôr zayol ne yô.
U sember hiin tom u he nahan u soo u pasen mba u lu eren tom a ve la iyol you. Nger washika u pasen iyol you shi pase er i saan we iyol u eren tom imôngo yô.
Nôngo u ngeren or u yange u vande ngohol we tom la a loho sha Intanet, sôn wer u er tom a mi sha u ngeren apelekeshen u he u eren tom. Pine ve ian sha icivir shi sugh ve sha iwasen ve.
Nger or u nan soo u yamen kwagh hen a we la washika u pasen we kwagh u kômpeni wou shi nan we tom wou kpaa. Tese akaa a vesen a u er yô, shi pase er u wase ve u eren kpenga yô.

Nôngo u ngeren kwagh u kasua u pasen ér i due a kwagh u he. Wa akaa a a lu ken kwagh u u lu teen la ker, man mbamtsera mba u lu a mi la, kua hanma kwagh u i lu samber a mi shin i lu panden inyaregh sha mi la cii.
Nger washika u dondon hen or u nan soo u yamen kwagh wou, u nan tese ér nan soo kwagh u u lu teen la. Umbur ve mbamtsera mba vea zua a mi la shi kaa a ve wer u na mlumun sha hanma mpin cii.
Nger email u tesen ér or u he nan nger iti sha takerada u abaver u kômpeni wou. Sugh ve sha er ve nger iti you yô, shi ôr ve kwagh u vea ver ishima ér vea er yô, shi wa ve kwagh u vea er yô.
Nger profesôr wou a loho sha Intanet ér i seer shighe u eren tom ugen. Pase mlu wou shi na shighe u vough u u er tom la yô.
Nger email hen mba u henen kwagh a ve imôngo mba ve lu nengen sha tom u nongo ugen la. Na ior ityom, ver ashighe a vea er tom la, shi ôr shighe u mkombo vea lam sha kwagh u mzehemen yô.
Nger profesôr ugen loho sha Intanet, u pine un kwagh u una wase u u eren kwaghtôvon yô. Tese akaa a a doo u la shi pase er i hii ve u soo u eren tom vea ve yô.
Nger profesôr wou a loho sha Intanet, zamber un wer a de u zan klase ga sha ci u akaa a a er u u ver ishima ga yô. Pine aluer kwagh ngu u i gbe u ú ôr yô.
Nger email hen or u ngise lu profesôr shin or u nan we kwagh la pinen kwaghwan sha kwagh u tom. Pase mlu wou hegen la kpuaa shi pine kwaghwan sha er u za hemen yô.

Mbagenev na jighjigh ér kwaghhenen u sha Intanet hemba u henen kwagh sha inja la, mbagenev di kaa ér kwaghhenen u ken klase ngu hange hange her. Lam sha mbamnenge mba uhar mban cii shi na mnenge wou kpaa.

Ior mbagenev na jighjigh ér doo u a sôr mbamzeyol mba sha kwagh u mlu u taregh sha tar cii, mbagenev di hen ér doo u a sôr mbamzeyol mban hen ijiir ve. Lam sha mbamnenge mba uhar mban cii shi na mnenge wou kpaa.
Mbagenev na jighjigh ér u zuan a tom man uma u vough la hemba taver nyian a ngise la. U lumun a kwaghôron ne shin u lumun a mi ga zan zan nyi?
Ken ityar kpishi, iyenge i ior ngi seer a seer, kpa mkpeyol man mlu u iyol i or ngu panden. Ka akaa a nyi nahan a ne ve zayol ne a lu zan hemene?
Mbagenev kaa ér gba u a kar inyamtoho sha u eren kwaghtôvon sha kwagh u tweregh, mbagenev di na jighjigh ér doo u a yange tom ne. Lam sha mbamnenge mba uhar mban cii shi na mnenge wou kpaa.
Ken ityar kpishi, agumaior nga nôngon kpoghuloo ér vea zua a tom. Ka akaa a nyi nahan a ne ve kwagh a lu zan hemene, man ka igbenda i nyi nahan u fatyô u kaan a mi sha u sôron zayol nee?
Mlu u iyolbeen ngu hingir zayol u vesen ken ityar kpishi. Ka akaa a nyi nahan a ne ve kwagh ne a lu zan hemene, man ka akaa a nyi nahan a fatyô u eren sha u sôron zayol nee?
Ken agar a vesen kpishi, mvihi u ahumbe man mngerem ka kwagh u vesen. Ka akaa a nyi nahan a ve a mbamzeyol mban, man ka akaa a nyi a fatyô u eren sha u sôron zayol laa?

Mbaganden kpishi mba a mfe u eren tom a ikyav mbi tomov mbi i yer ér digital la ken tar u ainge ne ga her. Ka atôakyaa a nyi nahan a ne ve kwagh a lu nahana, man ka nyi i er ve i seer fan takerada u ôron sha Intanet?
Ken agar kpishi, ior mba lun a ya ga mba seer a seer. Ka atôakyaa a nyi a ne ve ior ve lu seer a seer nahana, man ka nyi a fatyô u eren sha u panden zayol nee?
Mgem u mlu u taregh ngu benden a tar wase kpishi. Ka nyi u hen wer ka akaa a vesen a a ne ve mlu u taregh a lu geman laa, man ka nyi ia fatyô u benden a mlu u taregh?
Ior kpishi mba yamen akaa sha Intanet ken anyom a a sember karen ne. Ka atôakyaa a nyi nahan a ne ve ior ve lu eren kwagh nee, man ka nyi kwagh ne a bende a mbatomov mba hen ijiir laa?
Sha ajiir kpishi sha tar, iyenge i ior mba ve ôron ityakerada la pande kpishi. Ka atôakyaa a nyi a ne ve ior ve lu panden nahana, man ka nyi ia due ken mlu u iore?
Iyenge i ior i ngeen kpishi la ngi hingir kwagh u zan iyol ken agar kpishi. Ka akaa a nyi nahan a ne ve ior ve lu seer a seer, man ka nyi i lu benden a uma u ken agar laa?

Mzough u ityar sha won cii la va a mbamtsera kpishi, kpa shi ngu benden a akaa agen ken mlu u ior kpaa. Ka akaa a nyi nahan a ne ve mzough a lu zan hemen sha tar ciilii, man kwagh ne bende a tar nena?
Ken anyom a a sember karen ne, ior hemba eren tom ken ica. Lam sha mbamtsera man mbamzeyol mba tom u i eren ken ica la.
Ior kpishi mba moughon ken agar yemen ken agar a vesen. Lam sha mbamtsera man mbamzeyol mba ieren ne.
Mzehemen u kwaghfan u sangen yeke gema gbenda u ior ve lamen ayol a ve la. Ka mbamtsera man mbamzeyol mba nyi ve lu ken mzehemen nee?
Mba ken agar kpishi mba wan inyaregh sha akaa a ior ve zenden sha mi la sha er vea pande mzeyol u ior ve zenden sha mi la yô. Lam sha mbamtsera man mbamzeyol mba inyaregh kin ki lu a mi la.
Ior mba ve lu a ian i zan zende ken ityar igen la seer a seer kpishi. Lam sha akaa a dedoo man a vihin a mbavannya man ityar i i lu ngohol ve la vea zua a mi yô.

Ken ityar igen yô, ityom i nomsoor man kwase ngi geman, kpa ken ityar igen yô, ityom i aeren a ityôô ngi her. U lumun wer ityom i nomsoor man kwase ngi geman kpa? Kwagh ne ngu benden a nyi ken nongoior?
Mbagenev na jighjigh ér ka mbamaren tseegh ve lu a tom u yesen mbayev ye, mbagenev di hen ér gba u gomoti una er tom ne. Lam sha mbamnenge mba uhar mban cii shi na mnenge wou kpaa.
Mbagenev na jighjigh er akaa a sha ahumbe nga a bende a ior sha gbenda u dedoo, mbagenev di hen er nga a bende a ior sha gbenda u bo. Lam sha mbamnenge mba uhar mban cii shi na mnenge wou kpaa.
Mzough u ityar sha won cii ngu nan ior kera fa aeren a ityôô a ve ga. U lumun shin u lumun a mi ga zan zan nyi? Ka akaa a nyi nahan a fatyô u eren sha u kuran aeren a ityôô a hen ijiir laa?
Mbagenev na jighjigh ér kwagh u ityogholough ka kwagh u hange hange ken nongoior, mbagenev di hen ér ka kwagh u injaa. Lam sha mbamnenge mba uhar mban cii shi na mnenge wou kpaa.
Pase kwagh u mlu u ken hemen pepe ape hanma kwagh cii a lu sha tseeneke na shi a lu sha inja sha u a er tom tsembelee yo. Ka mbamtaver mba nyi ve ver ishima ga ve va?
Nenge ase wer u ngu a tahav mbu vesen mbu mbu ne u ian i memen miniti pue ken hanma ihwa yô. U wa kwagh ne ken akaa a u eren ayange ayange la nena?
Nger kwagh u iyange igen ken uma u or u nan lu a akaa a eren sha inja kpishi, u nan we agoyol sha hanma miniti u iyange i nan yô. Ka nyi ka i er shighe u akaa a hii u zan hemen sha inja ga laa?
Er kwagh u injaa man u a lu kposo u ngeren akaa a i gbe u a er ayange ayange la hingir anumbe yo. Ka atindi a nyi nahan, man a mgbegha u nena?

Er kwagh u or u nan lu nôngon ér nana de ieren i bo i ior ve eren hanma shighe la (er u eren kwagh sha shighe ga shin yan kwaghyan u kiriki kpishi nahan) sha u yaren tom a igbenda i ior ve fe i ga shin i eren ahir yô.
Nenge ase afishi a hanma ortom nan til sha ityough ki mlu u nan kposo kposo yô (er, iember, iyugh, iwuhe nahan). Ka ve nenge sha ityom i ayange ayange man mbamkombo nena?

Pase kwagh u tom u i eren ken ica, kpa u ma u eren tom hen ya yô, or u i er kwagh na la ngu eren tom sha ajiir kposo kposo a kpilighyol (er ucile mba ve lu sha mnger shin ikyon i i yer ér enchanted forests la nahan).
Nger kwagh u or u wasen or u nan lu a AI u nan hii u pasen akaa a i gbe u nana er la sha kwaghfan shi nan eren akaa a wasen shi a lu kwagh u or a nenge a mi ga yô.
Ken afishi a eren ahir yô, mbatomov ka ve er tom a icigh ki sôron angev sha u seer eren ityom kposo kposo. Ka nyi ka i er zum u or nan ma mcimbim ma bom sha ci u tom u u lu shami ga laa?

App u he ugen kaa ér ka a er kwagh u ‘iyange i tom i vough’ la sha aeren a or man kwagh u nan soo la. Nger kwagh u or u nan nôngo kwagh ne, kpa nan mase kaven ér kwagh ne hemba taver a ve hen la ica je.
Nenge ase er u lu ken iyou i i fetyô u sôron iyol i i kpa i lu a ‘mbamhen’ i i sha kwagh u i doo u mlu u wang una lu la yô. Ka mbamzeyol mba nyi ka ve due?
Pase gbenda u eren tom u hen ya u i gem hanma tom u hen ya cii i lu anumbe a kiriki yô, u iv a mlu u sha inja man injar man mbamtaver mba ior ve lu a ver ishima ga yô.
Er kwagh u sôron akaa ayange ayange ken tar u hanma iyange i lu van a kwagh u eren ahir kposo kposo yô, er ihyundu i i yer ér enchanted dust shin ikyav mbi sôron akaa mbi vihin tu nahan.
Hanma shighe u u lu ôôn akondo yô, sokisi ugen ka a saa, kpa u ma a bee kera yô, a zende ken shighe. Nger kwagh u akaa a kwagh ne a ne ve i zough a mi la.
Nenge ase wer hanma shighe u u lu eren anumbe yô, i yem a we hen ijiir igen i tahav ou mbu iyolough mbu bende a tar u u kase u la yô. Pase kwagh u mlu u iyol i or môm.
Nenge ase kwagh u yoga u i lu eren ken iyou i eren akaa a doon tsung, ape tahav mbu urugh akaa sha tar mbu lu geman, shi shighe a lu geman, shi mlu u iyol i or la kpa a lu eren kwagh u kpilighyol yô.
Pase kwagh u zende u ayange ayange ken gar u iv a akaauma a eren ahir yô, ape mato u ior ve zenden sha mi la a lu a akaa a eren ahir, shin akaauma a a lu purugh sha ahumbe, shin ihinda yô.
Hanma shighe u u nyôr mato u zan tom yô, u nenge a mlu ugen kposo u zende môm ken tar ugen u u lu kwagh môm yô. Ka akaa shin akaa a nyi nahan u hii u nengen a mi?
Nger kwagh u iliam i kpilighyol kpa i lu kpuaa i ka i er sha mato u ior cii ve zenden sha mi hen atô u mba ve dugh sha ajiir kposo kposo la.

Nenge ase kwagh u kasua u teen kwaghyan u ken hemen u ior mba ve lu a ikyagh ki tomough ki i yer ér AI la ve wasen mbayamen akaa, kpa ve lu a mhen ve yô. Kwagh ne bende a kwagh u ior ve eren ken kasua la nena?

Nger kwagh u eren tom ken kasua u mbateen kwagh ve teen akaa a ior ve eren hanma shighe la man akaa a eren ahir cii, shi u yamen akaa la ka kwagh u inyaregh tseegh ga, kpa ka kwagh u eren sha kwaghfan shin eren akaa a doon tsung.

Gema iyange i eren tom u i gbe u ú er la hingir kwagh u keren kwagh u vesen, man hanma ijiir i ú til her yô, i lu a zayol ugen kposo (er, u hiden zuan a akaa a i gbe u a er tom a mi ga la, sôron akaa a i yer ér puzzle la, man akaa agen nahan).
I na u tom u yamen akaa ken myer, kpa ajiir a teen akaa a i tindi u ker la ka akaa a ior ve eren sha inja ga yô—hanma kasua yô, ngu a kwagh u myer u i gbe u a pase yô.
I na u takerada u teen akaa a u soo u yamen la, u i lu inja er ngu ga yô. Er u lu keren yô, u nenge wer hanma kwagh cii ka ikyav i tesen ér kwagh ngu zan hemen yô.
Ken tar u ior vea kôôm mnya sha u dondon akaa a i eren hanma shighe la jighilii yô, pase er or ka nan wa iyol sha mnyam ma nan lu vough la yô.

Nger kwagh u or u nan eren tom u henen sha akaa sha ajiir a a hembe lun kposo yô (er, sha ityough ki iyou i taven sha, shin inya shin zegemnger, ken toho u lun a mngerem kpishi) sha u vea ver iyol ve ken atô shighe u ve er tom ayange kpishi yô.
Pase kwagh u aikighe ugen u i eren hanma shighe vea inyamtoho i i lu a tahav mbu geman mlu u i sha er ia zua sha mlu u or u nan lu a mi la yô.
Invent gbenda ugen kposo u ngeren kwagh sha u henen sha akaa a yange er sha iyange la, yar tom a akaa a taver we ishima a a ver ishima sha ashighe a kiriki a iwuese, akaa a he, shin fan iyol you yô.
Pase kwagh u or u nan lu a tahav mbu kpen ga kpa nan lu yan ican sha hanma kwagh u nan vihi iyol cii yô. Ka ve nôngo a uma ne nena?
Nenge ase or u nan lu a ikyagh ki tomough ki i yer ér robot ki ki lu a AI u vesen, ki ki hii u lun a ieren i nan man asaren a nan yô.
I er mkohol hen atô u annyamev mba ken tar ugen kposo kposo sha u vea er ikyuryan i bem sha tar cii yô. Ka ve hemba mbamtaver mba sha kwagh u zwa man aeren a ityôô nena?
Ken tar u ior vea ii akaa a ve umbur la, pase uma u ormbaiv u umbur kwagh u nan hii u fan kwagh u nan ga yô.
Ikpelaior i mbatôvonkwaghfan mbagenev er kwagh u eren tom a mi u yevese hen atô u ajiir, kpa hanma vegher yô, hemba vihin a u masetyô la sha gbenda u ken myer. Ka nyi i ne ve ve lu zan hemene?
Hunda ugen u u lu kwagh u myer yô, due ken toho u u ze hen tar u fae la. Ka nyi mbazendev mba hiihii mbara ve zough a mi vegher ugen laa?
Ikyôhô i i yer ér dragon la kera ngi ga ica i gba, kpa i hide i mar môm ken iyol i orumace. Kwagh ne bende a tar u ahir nena?
Pase kwagh u gar u hanma iyou man gbenda cii u lu uma, u a lu a mbamhen mba nan man er i lu nan ken ishima yô. Mba ve tem ker la mba lun imôngo vea uya vev mba ve lu her la nena?
I wa wantor shin wantor ifan ér a gema a hingir inyamtoho hanma tugh. Gba u vea ker gbenda u vea kar a ifan la kera cii ve ia ya ve ye.
Or ka nan hii u nengen a mbamnya vev mba vihin tsung mbara ken uma u kpôô kpôô. Hanma shighe u ve nder yô, vegher ugen u tar u mnyam ma cieryol la ka a dondo ve ken mlu u mimi.
Nger kwagh u kwagh u i yer ér technology (phone, laptop, man akaa agen) u or u vihin tu nan hingir u eren kwagh a mi yô. Ka i er tom a or u nan lu a mi la nena?
Hen geri u cuku ugen yô, iyange ka i bee fese nahan i lu tugh mbu il. Or môm kpa nana fatyô u duen ken gar la kera ga, nahan akaauma a kpilighyol hii u duen ken ime la.
Ikpelaior i azende agen gba ken takerada u tse ugen u u er kwagh u iniongo i yilan aôndo u i hungur un yô. Ve er kwagh ne er ka kwagh u eren nahan—zan zan a kar eren tom.
Ikpelaior i mbatôvonkwaghfan zua a mlu u ken myer u tar u ken won u lu a bende a mi ga anyom uderi imôngo yô. Ve mba eren kwagh a nongoior ne nena?
Pase kwagh u zende ugen u yange ve za hen zegemnger u a hembe lun a mngerem kpishi la, ape ve za zua a kwagh u ve ver ishima ga yô—ka gar u tsuaa u akaauma a i fe a ga la lu kuran yô.
Ken desereti u a iv a ahumbe a vihin tsung man akaauma a ken myer yô, mba ve zenden sha ajiir kposo kposo la ka ve gba ayem hanma inyom sha u vea zua a injar i ior ve fe i ga yô.
Mbatomov mba shin tso ugen yange ve gba shin icile igen i ior ve fe i ga, i i lu geman mlu u i hanma shighe shi i lu yeren akaa a myer a tsuaa la yô.
Ikpelaior i mbaiv mba sha kwavaôndo ka ve zende sha utso mba ve lu sha mnger la man ken agar a sha kwavaôndo sha u keren kwagh u injaa ugen u i yer ken abeen yô.
Or u keren akaa ka nan nder yô, nan umbur ahwa 48 a a kar la ga, kpa nan nenge ér ka ve ve lu mba ve hembe lun a ibo i vesen ye. Ve tese ér ve mba a ibo ga nena?
Hotel ugen ka a due sha ajiir kposo kposo sha tar sha gbenda u kpilighyol, kpa ka tugh tseegh. Shighe u iyange i lu van yô, i bee kera. Ka nyi i lu kwagh u myer?
Ken ijiir i tesen akaa a i gber la, i i fe i tsembelee yô, akaa a i gber la hii u ôron akaa a myer sha kwagh u ior mba ve nengen a mi la. Ka nyi i lu ken ijime i kwagh u kpilighyol nee?
Nger kwagh u gar ugen u ior ve lu yevese kera môm môm a mshi shio yô. Mba ve shi her la mba a kwagh u umbur kwagh u mba ve saa la ga.

Or u nan fe nan ga u nan hua ikyondo i cirin iyol yô, ka nan za hemen u duen sha ajiir kposo kposo a ior ve eren aferakaa her la kpa mayange i lu inja er nan ngu a kwagh u eren aferakaa la ga nahan. Ve lu unô, man ka nyi ve fe?
Nenge ase kwagh ugen u yange er, u Leonardo da Vinci yange kure ikyagh ki tomough ki ki eren tom sha shighe la yô. Aluer i zua a mi sha ayange ase ne yô, ma lu nena?
Nger kwagh u orngeren abaver ugen u nan lu ôron kwagh u vesen u yange er ken ijime, u nan gem kwagh u a dugh ker la sha ivande sha ripoti i môm tseegh yô.
Pase kwagh u nongo ugen u u lu hendan kwagh a gomoti ugen shighe u gomoti u kighir ior la, man mbamtaver mba sha kwagh u aeren a vough mba ve tagher a mi sha er vea war yô.
I hide i zua a tartor ugen u i hen ér u saa ken kwagh u mbayiase yô, kpa ior mba ker mba beenyol anyom uderi imôngo hegen ga. Lu nyi i er ve?
Ken hemen kpuaa yô, a fatyo u geman mlu u ken ishima la hingir u lun ken iyol kposo kposo. Ka nyi ka i er zum u or nan gem nan hingir iyol i i er sha ave, nan soo u hiden lun er yange nan lu la?
Nger kwagh u nongoior u mashin a tese ér or ngu a aeren a vough yô. Ka nyi ka i er zum u or u nan lu a aeren a vough ga nan hendan a mlu u tar laa?
Ikpelaior i mbasainsi kav ér mnyam ma cier ka akaa a a lu kwagh môm yô. Kwagh ne gema mkav u se lu a mi sha kwagh u mhen la nena?
Ken uma u ken hemen la, ka i ôr uumace ijir sha u umbur erdoo u ve undu la. Or u i er kwagh na ken takerada ne kav ér inyaregh ki ve lu a mi la ki bee.
Nger kwagh u nongo u mbahemenev mba vesen mba ve mem tom, mba ve dugh ken tom ve sha u za eren tom u masetyô yô.
Pase kwagh u or u nan lu zenden sha shighe u nan lu zenden sha shighe ugen, u nan lu ken tar ugen u u lu kwagh môm a akaa a yange er sha ayange a tsuaa la, nan gema sha gbenda ugen kposo yô.
Nenge ase tartor u mlu u ken ishima a lu hemen mlu u ahumbe yô. Pase iyange igen ken uma u or u nan lu marnya u tar la yô.
Er kwagh u a lu kwagh u tse u i er sha ave yô, ka a bende a mi yô, a tese or u nan lu a mi la kwagh u una er nan ken hemen yô, kpa a lu sha ci u sekônd pue tseegh.
Nger kwaghôron u kpuaa sha mnenge u tso u lun a mhen u a lu a ishimaverenkeghen, u a soo u lun vea we kpa a lu sha tar u ior ve lu her ga yô.
Nger kwaghôron u hen atô u or u keren kwagh u mbaaferev man or u nan lu a kwaghfan u eren ipila, mba ve lu azende a ve ken myer shighe u ve lu iyev la.
Er iliam hen atô u or u nan zenden sha kwavaôndo man or u ken tar ugen u nan lu lamen sha u yaren tom a ikyav mbi tomov sha ityough ki asember yô.
Nger kwaghôron u hen atô u or u nan lu uma man jijingi u nan ne kwaghwan u uma u nan lu a ver ishima ga yô.
Craft iliam i hen atô u AI man or u nan gbe un la, ape AI la a pine kwagh u a ne ve a lu la.
Pase kwagh u tar u ior mba ve lu a mzehemen kpishi ve lu sha icile i i lu sha kwavaôndo la, shi i lu tôôn akaa a injaa sha ikyev i ikyav mbi vesen mbi i yer ér balloons la yô.
Nenge ase mlu u tar u ior ve lu eren ahir man kwaghfan u sangen yeke imôngo yô. Ior mba eren tom a tahav mbun ken uma ve ayange ayange nena?
Er tar u mngerem ma duen her tseegh ma lu ikyasen i i yer ér mystical oasis, i i zenden hanma uwer la, nahan ior mba ve lu ker cii ve lu yemen ken ityar igen hanma shighe yô.
Pase kwagh u tar u u lu ken ijime i mkurtar, u u hide u maa iyol u hingir utopia, kpa u lu a akaa a myer a a lu vihin bem u u la yô.
Er haiku mba hanma ve ve til sha ityough ki kwagh u umbur u dooshima u i hungur la.
Nôngo u ngeren icam i ia yem a or u nan lu ôron kwagh la ken mnyam ma ma lu ken mnya yô, i zua a kwagh u mimi man kwagh u nan hen ken ishima la.
Nger icam i ia kôr mlu u gar u ior ve lu eren ayôôso her la, inja er ka icam i wan nahan.
Nenge ase er akaa a i gbe a la a lu wan icam i doon tsung sha tar cii ve tugh mbu il ye. Ka mkaanem man akav a nyi yange ma a er tom a mi?
Aluer ikyav mbi ken tar cii mbi hii u been kera môm môm di ye? Pase kwagh u ka a er shighe u i lu a kala môm tseegh yô.
Er kwagh u iyou i koson ityakerada i i lu a hanma takerada u i vande ngeren cii man hanma takerada u i lu u a nger cii yô.
Nenge ase tar u ior ve lu eren akaa a nan ve ishimanyian shi ve lu teen yô. Kwagh ne una gema mlu u uumache man mlu u ior nena?
Aluer ior hii u beenyol ken ijime, ve hingir agumaior er ve lu uma ica i gbe la di ye? Kwagh ne una bende a mlu ve man mnenge u ve lu a mi sha kwagh u shighe la nena?
